entities.name: CROP-LIVESTOCK FARMING
entities.description: A sustainable and diversified farming system integrating crop production and livestock farming

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing and harvesting crops

entities.name: LIVESTOCK FARMING
entities.description: The process of raising livestock animals

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL IMPACT
entities.description: The negative effect of farming activities on the environment

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: Long-term shifts in temperatures and weather patterns affecting agriculture

entities.name: LAND DEGRADATION
entities.description: The decline in the quality and productivity of land

entities.name: CROP RESIDUES
entities.description: Plant material remaining after harvest, used as a livestock feed resource

entities.name: HEATWAVES
entities.description: Periods of extreme heat that can negatively impact forage and productivity

entities.name: DROUGHT
entities.description: Prolonged periods of water shortage affecting crop and forage health

entities.name: DISEASES
entities.description: Pathological conditions that reduce forage quality and productivity

entities.name: FORAGE QUALITY
entities.description: The nutritional value and health status of forage used for livestock feed

entities.name: PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output from crops or livestock

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL METHODS
entities.description: Traditional, labor-intensive, and costly ways of assessing forage quality

entities.name: UAV-BASED IMAGING
entities.description: The use of unmanned aerial vehicles to capture high-resolution images for crop improvement

entities.name: HYPERSPECTRAL IMAGING
entities.description: A sensing technique providing enriched spectral information for precise evaluation of feed and health

entities.name: ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
entities.description: Computational techniques used to analyze high-dimensional data and extract insights

entities.name: MACHINE LEARNING
entities.description: A subset of AI used for data analytics and algorithm development on imaging data

entities.name: CROP-LIVESTOCK FARM MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The integrated management of crop and livestock systems to enhance sustainability and productivity

entities.name: LIVESTOCK HEALTH
entities.description: The physical and physiological well-being of livestock animals
